title: SCS secondary paid employment details 2024 to 2025
body: "The Cabinet Office guidance on the declaration and management of outside interests in the Civil Service requires that all paid outside employment held by SCS members, that has been agreed through the process for the declaration and management of outside interests, is published.  In compliance with that guidance, the CMA has published the necessary information concerning secondary paid employment held by its SCS members during the reporting year 2024 to 2025.  "
